close_reason: superseded by everything-is-incremental: B1 deletes the SemanticClosure composite; widen does not fit the pure Reconcile trait — surviving folds carried to the incremental epic (see comment)
description: Activation return: reconcile = (widen(current, incoming), advance iff widened != current) -- replaces define_return's bespoke path; keep Option current = not-computed (unknown-is-not-none). define_analysis + SemanticClosure composite likewise. Removes the last special-case reconcilers.

comments.text: Closed as superseded by everything-is-incremental (.agent/targets/everything-is-incremental.md). Carry-overs for the incremental epic ticketing: (1) trivial fold of ActivationMap::define_analysis (semantic.rs:112) and CallSiteMap::define (semantic.rs:144) onto monotonic() — these stores survive B2; (2) the define_return widen (semantic.rs:90) needs &mut Types and cannot fit the pure Reconcile trait (identity.rs:589) — the widen-vs-trait decision travels with whatever ticket reshapes ReturnType reconciliation; (3) the SemanticClosure-composite half is deleted outright by arc B1 (SemanticClosureMap, DependencySnapshot, semantic_closure_is_current, wait_for_fresh_closure).

title: Fold Activation widen + SemanticClosure composite into Reconcile impls
